inputs.name: keepMounted
inputs.description: Keep the indicator in the DOM when unchecked so CSS exit animations can play.

parts.description:
The hidden native radio input that mirrors the item state for form submission, native validation,
and `<label>` activation. Place it inside an `rdxRadioItem`.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/radio

inputs.name: readOnly
inputs.description:
Whether the user should be unable to select this radio button. Bound in templates as
`readOnly` (Base UI spelling); the TS member stays `readonly` for cross-primitive consistency.

inputs.name: readOnly
inputs.description:
Whether the user should be unable to select a different radio button. Bound in templates as
`readOnly` (Base UI spelling); the TS member stays `readonly` for cross-primitive consistency.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
The selected value. Deliberately typed as `string` (not Base UI's generic `Value`):
a radio group maps onto native radio inputs whose form value is a string, so values are
the option identifiers. Use the string key of your option as the value.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending controls publish neither `data-valid` nor `data-invalid`.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Whether the control has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; set on blur/focus-out.

outputs.name: onValueChange
outputs.description: Event handler called when the value changes.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits when the control is touched, notifying Signal Forms (stable Angular 22 contract).
